previous_codified.summary: R10 exercise-directory restructure; two-format rule update; M5 restructure to per-technique files; readings/ reorg

actions_taken.reason: Added Redline 11 (Self-Contained Colab Is the Canonical Notebook Format), Redline 12 (Class-Based Equation Markup and Shared Deck Assets), Redline 13 (Shared Package Structure and Transitive Inlining). Extended Redline 3 with the Full CI Guard Suite (check-deck-overflow.js + check_notebook_syntax.py + check-deck-parity.sh).
Added §10 Exercise Delivery (two-format contract: local .py + colab-selfcontained .ipynb only) and §11 Shared Helper Package (shared/ layout, import discipline, _shared.py vs helpers.py convention).
Updated redlines.md description from '8 non-negotiable' to '13 non-negotiable' and added self-contained / katex / shared-inlining tags.

Canonical Colab path updated to modules/mlfpNN/colab-selfcontained/, replaced py_to_notebook.py references with generate_selfcontained_notebook.py, updated format-differences table for inlined-helpers pattern.
R10 directory layout now includes both colab-selfcontained/ (student) and colab-selfcontained-solutions/ (instructor) dirs.

R10 diagram updated to show two-way output (student + instructor notebooks). Two-format generation section now invokes scripts/generate_selfcontained_notebook.py with full CLI. Added mandate that scripts/check_notebook_syntax.py MUST pass before commit.

Parity check updated to reference colab-selfcontained/ + colab-selfcontained-solutions/ (not old colab/ + notebooks/). Converter-specific checks renamed to reference generate_selfcontained_notebook.py; added structural checks for Cell 0 pip boilerplate and Cell 1 'MLFP inlined helpers' marker.

Canonical 555-line generator. Strips all three forms of from shared.* imports, walks the import graph to fixpoint, flattens M6 diagnostics subpackage (_plots.X -> X), rewrites REPO_ROOT for Colab safety (Path(__file__).parents[N] -> Path.cwd()), AST-validates every emitted code cell.
CI guard — AST-parses every .ipynb code cell repo-wide, strips IPython magics with shell-continuation folding, accepts student notebooks with intentional # TODO / ____ scaffolds.
CI guard — rebuilds M5/M6 deck PDFs via decktape, pdftotexts them, diffs against committed baselines in scripts/deck-parity-baselines/. Catches katex-init.js regressions.
Idempotent KaTeX renderer extracted from M5+M6 decks. Pre-captures LaTeX source into data-mlfp-source before any render pass can pollute textContent. M5+M6 decks now include it via script src.
Deck author contract for class-based equation markup. Documents the M5+M6 consumer list and M1-M4 delimiter-syntax decks that would need content rewrites to adopt.
Rolled out self-contained Colab pattern to all 6 modules — 398 notebooks total. M5 regenerated from scratch (supersedes the 2026-04-17 regex band-aid over broken commit 6b28127).
Consolidation — dropped 299 notebooks across three legacy formats + the superseded converter. One Colab implementation across every module.
Canonical paths updated from colab/ to colab-selfcontained/. README-student.md Colab section rewritten — no FORK_URL, no git clone, students open notebooks directly.

commits: bd7a1c0 feat(decks): extract shared KaTeX renderer to modules/assets/js/
2c8676d feat(notebooks): self-contained Colab generator + CI guards; regenerate M5
5459bfa feat(notebooks): roll out self-contained Colab to M1-M4+M6 (314 notebooks)
8696560 refactor(notebooks): consolidate on self-contained Colab; drop legacy formats
38549f1 fix(notebooks): transitive shared imports + Colab-safe REPO_ROOT; regenerate
8c6820b docs(specs): codify session learnings — redlines 11-13 + shared/ structure
